query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "agenticsts: a bounded-memory testbed for long-horizon llm agents" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) by investigating the same core mechanism (long-horizon LLM agent memory architectures) and measuring the same dependent variables (factual precision, reasoning coherence, and determinism) within the specific domain of bounded-memory agents, providing essential empirical baselines and alternative architectural approaches for the user's follow-up research.
